title: You're Not So Tough
writer: Arthur T. Horman, Maxwell Aley, Brenda Weisberg
actors: The Dead End Kids, Nan Grey, Rosina Galli
plot: The Dead End Kids are out of the slums of New York's East Side and running around the sunny valleys of California looking for a way to make a quick buck. The idea of working never enters their minds until Halop is egged on by Grey...
